title: StaffM - Employee Management Dashboard
description: Full-featured HR dashboard for managing employees with CRUD operations, analytics, and advanced client-side state management using Vanilla JavaScript.

title: Marcedo - E-Commerce Web Application
description: Full-featured e-commerce web application built with React, featuring product browsing, cart management, authentication, and a complete checkout experience.

title: Alpha Landing Page
description: A modern responsive landing page with smooth animations and optimized UI/UX.

title: Educora – CMS Frontend Platform
description: Scalable learning management system (LMS) frontend built with React and TypeScript, featuring structured architecture, course management, and dynamic user experience.

title: Product Management Dashboard
description: Inventory management dashboard for tracking, organizing, and managing products with full CRUD operations.
